calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2014 Off Calendar

Motion, Application And Declaration Of Robert P. Gates For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Robert P. Gates, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs, YING-WOOD WONG, an individual and dba WONG PROPERTIES; YING-KUEN WONG, an individual and dba WONG PROPERTIES; and YING-HON WONG, an individual, and dba WONG PROPERTIES.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) BAY AREA DOLD AND SILVER BUYERS, LLC a limited liability company, and GRAYMEIREN HOLDINGS, LLC, a limited liability company.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 20 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Ying-Wood Wong sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $36,435.37
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,289.30
Attorney's Fees: $6,360.00
Costs: $672.27
Total Judgment in the amount of $46,756.94
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Continued To Oct-29-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
